exercises.sentence: Cada mañana, yo ____ por el parque para ir al trabajo.
exercises.translation: Every morning, I pass by the park to go to work.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ mucho tiempo leyendo libros interesantes.
exercises.translation: I spend a lot of time reading interesting books.

exercises.sentence: Cuando ____ por tu casa, siempre te saludo.
exercises.translation: When I pass by your house, I always greet you.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo ____ una tarde increíble con mis amigos en la playa.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I spent an incredible afternoon with my friends at the beach.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ por el examen sin ninguna dificultad.
exercises.translation: I passed the exam without any difficulty.

exercises.sentence: El año pasado, yo ____ mis vacaciones en México.
exercises.translation: Last year, I spent my vacation in Mexico.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo ____ horas jugando en el jardín.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I used to spend hours playing in the garden.

exercises.sentence: Siempre que yo ____ por esa calle, veía muchas flores.
exercises.translation: Whenever I used to pass by that street, I saw many flowers.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ mucho calor durante los veranos en mi ciudad natal.
exercises.translation: I used to be very hot during the summers in my hometown.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ más tiempo contigo si tuviera vacaciones.
exercises.translation: I would spend more time with you if I had vacation.

exercises.sentence: Si pudiera viajar, yo ____ todo el verano en España.
exercises.translation: If I could travel, I would spend the whole summer in Spain.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ por tu casa mañana si tengo tiempo.
exercises.translation: I would pass by your house tomorrow if I have time.

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo ____ a buscarte a las ocho de la noche.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will pass by to pick you up at eight at night.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ el resto de mi vida tratando de ser mejor persona.
exercises.translation: I will spend the rest of my life trying to be a better person.

exercises.sentence: Pronto yo ____ por la oficina para dejarte los documentos.
exercises.translation: Soon I will pass by the office to leave you the documents.
